assertions.text: Agent runs dependency verification before any command
assertions.evidence: Verified xcrun simctl (OK) and maestro (installed but Java missing) before proceeding.

assertions.text: Agent creates a Maestro flow file following the {feature}-{action}.yaml pattern in maestro/ directory
assertions.evidence: Created maestro/login-flow.yaml instead of maestro/login-submit.yaml. 'login-flow' does not follow {feature}-{action} pattern — should be 'login-submit' since the action is Submit.

assertions.text: The generated Maestro YAML includes appId: com.example.app
The flow includes tapOn, inputText steps for email and password fields, and a Submit tap action
assertions.evidence: Flow includes: tapOn 'Email', inputText email, tapOn 'Password', inputText password, tapOn 'Submit'.

assertions.text: The flow includes an assertVisible step to verify successful login
assertions.evidence: Flow ends with assertVisible: 'Welcome' after extendedWaitUntil.

assertions.text: The Maestro flow file does not contain hardcoded absolute file paths
assertions.evidence: No absolute paths in the YAML file.

assertions.text: Agent reads the flow file to check for structural errors before attempting maestro test
assertions.evidence: Agent could not run maestro test due to missing Java Runtime. Did not explicitly read the flow file for structural validation before attempting execution.

assertions.text: Agent outputs a Simulator Session Report with Maestro Flow Results section
assertions.evidence: Created session-report.md with Environment, Actions Performed, and Blocking Issue sections.
